description: VS Code Web - Visual Studio Code in the browser

variables.name: accept_license
variables.description: Accept the VS Code Server license. https://code.visualstudio.com/license/server

variables.name: agent_id
variables.description: The ID of a Coder agent.

variables.name: auto_install_extensions
variables.description: Automatically install recommended extensions when VS Code Web starts.

variables.name: commit_id
variables.description: Commit ID to pin VS Code Web to a specific version.

variables.name: disable_trust
variables.description: Disables workspace trust protection for VS Code Web.

variables.name: extensions_dir
variables.description: Override the directory to store extensions in.

variables.name: folder
variables.description: The folder to open in vscode-web.

variables.name: offline
variables.description: Just run VS Code Web in the background, don't fetch it from the internet.

variables.name: platform
variables.description: The platform to use for the VS Code Web.

variables.name: port
variables.description: The port to run VS Code Web on.

variables.name: telemetry_level
variables.description: Set the telemetry level for VS Code Web.

variables.name: use_cached
variables.description: Uses cached copy of VS Code Web in the background, otherwise fetches it from internet.

variables.name: workspace
variables.description: Path to a .code-workspace file to open in vscode-web.
